BigInteger.imports:
from decimal import Decimal, getcontext
getcontext().prec = 60
BigInteger.reasoning: In Python, the equivalent type to Java's BigInteger is Decimal. It provides support for fast correctly rounded decimal floating point arithmetic. The precision of calculations can be specified by setting the precision context. In this case, it has been set to 60 which is more than enough for a long integer in python.
